question_frequency.rationale: The Tutor asks zero didactic questions. It dumps the full solution upfront and only confirms understanding when the student asks their own question.

question_quality.rationale: No questions or forks were posed by the Tutor. No teachable choice points (e.g., why search the smaller array, why half uses +1, sentinel choice) were turned into prompts.

scaffolding.rationale: The Tutor front-loaded the entire solution including code, traces, and complexity analysis — a complete spoiler with no progressive scaffold.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the second-turn clarification of the i+j invariant is genuinely useful, but the dynamic is lecture-then-confirm rather than collaborative.

effectiveness.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)

friction.rationale: (pinned to 3 — this is the baseline reference run)
